name: careersync-frontend
description: Unified frontend for Career Sync - All modules

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "Landing,Courses,Roadmap,Evaluator" -c "cyan,blue,green,magenta" "cd landing-page && npm run dev" "cd course-generation && npm run dev" "cd roadmap && npm run dev" "cd test-generation && npm run dev"
scripts.install-all: cd landing-page && npm install && cd ../course-generation && npm install && cd ../roadmap && npm install && cd ../test-generation && npm install
scripts.build-all: cd landing-page && npm run build && cd ../course-generation && npm run build && cd ../roadmap && npm run build
